ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "psgc_code" TEXT /* Philippine Standard Geographic Code (PSGC) for the province */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the province belongs */,
  "province_capital" TEXT /* The capital city of the province */,
  "province_area" REAL /* The total land area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "province_population" INTEGER /* The estimated population of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disasters" (
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster event */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the disaster occurred */,
  "disaster_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of disaster */,
  "disaster_date" TEXT /* Date when the disaster occurred */,
  "disaster_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the disaster */,
  "disaster_count" INTEGER /* Number of disaster occurrences in the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disasters_disaster_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_type_id") REFERENCES disaster_types ("disaster_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disasters_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_statistics" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact statistic record */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster event */,
  "affected_families" INTEGER /* Number of families affected by the disaster */,
  "affected_persons" INTEGER /* Number of persons affected by the disaster */,
  "dead" INTEGER /* Number of deaths caused by the disaster */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Number of injured individuals due to the disaster */,
  "missing" INTEGER /* Number of missing individuals due to the disaster */,
  "damaged_houses_full" INTEGER /* Number of fully damaged houses */,
  "damaged_houses_partial" INTEGER /* Number of partially damaged houses */,
  "damaged_properties_agri" REAL /* Total agricultural property damage (in million PHP) */,
  "damaged_properties_infra" REAL /* Total infrastructure property damage (in million PHP) */,
  "damaged_properties_private" REAL /* Total private property damage (in million PHP) */,
  "damage_total" REAL /* Total damage cost (in million PHP) */,
  "affected_communities" INTEGER /* Number of communities affected by the disaster */,
  "evacuation_centers" INTEGER /* Number of evacuation centers established */,
  "relief_goods" TEXT /* List of relief goods provided to affected individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_statistics_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., provincial officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the user is assigned to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the report */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster event */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the disaster event */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_files" TEXT /* List of files attached to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_types" (
  "disaster_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of disaster */,
  "disaster_name" TEXT /* Name of the disaster */,
  "disaster_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the disaster type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "disaster_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of disaster */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affected province */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date when the impact occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact */,
  "affected_infrastructure" TEXT /* List of affected infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disaster_impact_disaster_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_type_id") REFERENCES disaster_types ("disaster_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disaster_impact_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_efforts" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response effort */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster event */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response effort took place */,
  "effort_description" TEXT /* Description of the response effort */,
  "resources_used" TEXT /* Resources used in the response effort */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response effort */,
  "response_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes from the response effort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_efforts_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)
